hero.name: Pratik Ravasaheb Thete
hero.introduction: I build intelligent systems and elegant interfaces from neural networks to production-ready web apps. Passionate about turning data into decisions and ideas into impactful software.

about.bio: I'm a third-year B.Tech student specializing in AI & Data Science at VIT, driven by a passion for building systems that are not just functional, but intelligent. I thrive at the intersection of machine learning, full-stack development, and real-world problem solving.
about.objective: To leverage my expertise in AI/ML and full-stack development to contribute to innovative, data-driven solutions at a forward-thinking organization, while continuously growing as an engineer and researcher.

projects.title: AI-Powered Weather Analytics
projects.description: A full-stack weather application with ML-based forecast predictions, real-time OpenWeatherMap integration, and an elegant glassmorphism UI.
projects.overview: A sophisticated weather forecasting platform that goes beyond traditional APIs by incorporating ML models trained on historical data to improve prediction accuracy by up to 23%.
projects.problem: Standard weather APIs provide generic forecasts. This project solves hyper-local weather prediction using custom ML models trained on regional historical patterns.
challenges: Training models on sparse historical data
Balancing API call limits with real-time needs
Mobile-first responsive design with complex charts
learnings: Advanced data preprocessing for time-series forecasting
Integrating Python ML models with Node.js via microservices
Optimizing React performance with large datasets

projects.title: SmartResume — AI Resume Analyzer
projects.description: An NLP-powered resume analysis tool that scores, improves, and tailors resumes for ATS systems and specific job descriptions.
projects.overview: SmartResume leverages NLP to parse, score, and improve resumes in real-time against job descriptions, helping candidates optimize for ATS systems.
projects.problem: Over 75% of resumes are rejected by ATS before a human reads them. This tool solves the cold-start problem for job seekers.
challenges: Handling diverse resume formats and layouts
Accurately extracting structured data from unstructured text
Building a scoring system that reflects real ATS behavior
learnings: Containerizing Python ML apps with Docker

projects.title: DataViz Studio — No-Code Analytics
projects.description: A drag-and-drop data visualization platform that lets non-technical users create beautiful dashboards from CSV/Excel data.
projects.overview: DataViz Studio democratizes data analytics by providing a no-code interface for creating interactive visualizations from raw data files.
projects.problem: Data visualization tools are either too complex for non-technical users or too limited for meaningful analysis.
challenges: Rendering large datasets without performance degradation
Supporting multiple chart types with a unified API
learnings: Advanced D3.js data binding and transitions
Virtual DOM optimization for large datasets

projects.title: MediScan — Medical Image AI
projects.description: A deep learning application for classifying chest X-rays to detect pneumonia with 94.2% accuracy using CNN architecture.
projects.overview: MediScan is a computer vision system trained on 5,000+ chest X-rays that helps radiologists identify pneumonia with high confidence scores.
projects.problem: Radiology backlogs cause delayed diagnoses. An AI-assisted pre-screening tool can prioritize urgent cases and support doctors.
challenges: Class imbalance in medical training data
learnings: Transfer learning with VGG16 and ResNet architectures
Model explainability techniques for high-stakes AI

projects.title: CodeCollab — Real-Time IDE
projects.description: A browser-based collaborative coding environment with real-time sync, syntax highlighting, and AI code completion.
projects.overview: CodeCollab enables multiple developers to write, run, and share code in real-time directly from the browser with zero setup.
projects.problem: Remote pair programming requires cumbersome screen-sharing tools. CodeCollab provides a native shared IDE experience.
learnings: CRDT algorithms for collaborative text editing

projects.title: FinTrack — Personal Finance AI
projects.description: An AI-powered personal finance tracker with expense categorization, budget forecasting, and spending anomaly detection.
projects.overview: FinTrack connects to bank accounts and uses ML to automatically categorize expenses, predict future spending, and flag unusual transactions.
projects.problem: People lack visibility into their spending patterns. Manual tracking is tedious; FinTrack automates the entire process intelligently.
challenges: Secure OAuth integration with banking APIs
Training a categorization model on diverse transaction descriptions
learnings: Plaid API integration and OAuth security flows

experience.description: Developed and deployed NLP pipelines for sentiment analysis and entity extraction on customer feedback data. Improved model accuracy by 18% through feature engineering and hyperparameter tuning.
Assisted in research on federated learning for privacy-preserving medical AI. Implemented baseline CNN models and contributed to a paper submitted at ICML 2024.
Built and deployed 5+ web applications for clients across e-commerce, healthcare, and education sectors. Managed end-to-end development from UI design to cloud deployment.

research.title: Online Bookstore With Review Enhanced Hybrid Recommendation System
research.conference: International Conference on Emerging Trends in Computers & Communication 2025

research.title: Enhancing Collaborative Code Editors with Semantic Awareness
research.conference: International Conference on Computing Theory and Wireless Communication 2026
research.abstract: Because they allow for simultaneous code editing, real-time synchronization, and shared awareness among developers, real-time collaborative code editors are frequently used to facilitate dispersed software development. The standard collaborative code editors provide many of the basic functionalities required for multi-user editing (syntax highlighting, role-independent collaboration, etc.) and many do not provide any context regarding developers' intentions, semantic meaning of code or types of edits being made

achievements.title: ICON Club Coords
achievements.description: Selected as Project Coordinator at VIT Pune, Build appliaction in web and AI development.

achievements.title: Top 100 — HackerEarth ML Challenge
achievements.description: Ranked in the top 100 out of 8,000+ participants in HackerEarth's national machine learning competition.

achievements.title: Best Research Paper — VIT Symposium
achievements.description: Awarded Best Research Paper at VIT's annual technology symposium for work on privacy-preserving federated learning.

testimonials.name: Dr. Anjali Sharma
testimonials.review: Pratik is one of the most inquisitive students I've mentored. His ability to bridge theory and implementation, especially in ML research, is exceptional. He consistently delivers work that exceeds expectations.

testimonials.name: Rohan Kapoor
testimonials.review: During his internship, Pratik independently designed and shipped a production NLP pipeline that reduced our manual labeling effort by 40%. His initiative and code quality are hire-worthy.

testimonials.name: Sneha Patil
testimonials.review: We hired Pratik as a freelance developer and he delivered a full-stack platform in 3 weeks that we thought would take 2 months. His communication, reliability, and technical depth are rare.
